name: example-app
description: Example App - Generated by Bobra Framework

scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:generate-configs && concurrently "pnpm --filter @example-app/dashboard run dev:build" "pnpm exec wrangler -c router/example-app-router-worker/wrangler.jsonc -c workers/example-app-dashboard-worker/wrangler.jsonc -c workers/example-app-api-docs-worker/wrangler.jsonc dev --local --persist-to=${LOCAL_WRANGLER_DIR}" -n "app,backend"
scripts.dev:nofrontends: pnpm run dev:generate-configs && pnpm exec wrangler -c router/example-app-router-worker/wrangler.jsonc -c workers/example-app-api-docs-worker/wrangler.jsonc dev --local --persist-to=${LOCAL_WRANGLER_DIR}
scripts.migrate:local:postgres: cd shared-utils && DB_ENGINE=postgres pnpm run migrate -- --local
scripts.migrate:local:d1: cd shared-utils && DB_ENGINE=d1-sqlite pnpm run migrate -- --local --wrangler-config=../workers/example-app-api-docs-worker/wrangler.jsonc --persist-to=${LOCAL_WRANGLER_DIR}

author: Danylo Hotvianskyi
